data.debug_attr_logging: Debug: log all attribute values to CSV
data.debug_raw_logging: Debug: log raw BLE packets to CSV

data_description.cloud_email: Your Cleanergy app account email. Used once to fetch the device key — credentials are NOT stored.
data_description.cloud_password: Your Cleanergy app account password. Used once to fetch the device key — credentials are NOT stored.
data_description.device_key: 10-character hex key unique to your device (e.g. bd236b1695). Auto-populated from the OUPES cloud API when possible. You can also enter or override it manually from a btsnoop/PCAPdroid capture of the Cleanergy app.
data_description.continuous_connection: Keep the Bluetooth connection open permanently instead of polling every 30 seconds. Captures infrequent sensor updates (e.g. battery voltage) but blocks the official app from connecting at the same time.
data_description.debug_attr_logging: Write all received attribute values (including unknown ones and attr-78 mystery values) to oupes_mega_<addr>_attrs.csv in your HA config folder. Emits warnings in the HA log for unrecognised attr-78 values.
data_description.debug_raw_logging: Write every raw BLE notification payload as hex to oupes_mega_<addr>_raw.csv in your HA config folder. Useful for offline analysis with the debug_info scripts.

user.title: OUPES Mega Power Station
user.description:
Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your OUPES Mega device. The device advertises via BLE as **TT**. If a device was already found nearby it will be pre-filled below.

To auto-fetch the device key, enter your Cleanergy cloud credentials. Credentials are used once and are **not** stored.

data_description.cloud_email: Your Cleanergy app account email. Used once to fetch the device key — credentials are NOT stored.
data_description.cloud_password: Your Cleanergy app account password. Used once to fetch the device key — credentials are NOT stored.
data_description.device_key: 10-character hex key unique to your device. Leave blank and provide cloud credentials to auto-fetch, or enter manually from a btsnoop/PCAPdroid capture.

bluetooth_confirm.title: OUPES Mega Power Station
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Found **{name}** ({address}) nearby.

Device ID: `{device_id}`

To auto-fetch the device key, enter your Cleanergy cloud credentials below. Credentials are used once and are **not** stored.

data_description.cloud_email: Your Cleanergy app account email. Used once to fetch the device key — credentials are NOT stored.
data_description.cloud_password: Your Cleanergy app account password. Used once to fetch the device key — credentials are NOT stored.
data_description.device_key: 10-character hex key unique to your device. Leave blank and provide cloud credentials to auto-fetch, or enter manually from a btsnoop/PCAPdroid capture.

error.invalid_address: Invalid Bluetooth MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.invalid_device_key: Device key must be exactly 10 hexadecimal characters (e.g. bd236b1695).
error.cloud_login_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your Cleanergy email and password, or enter the device key manually.
error.no_device_key: A device key is required. Enter your Cleanergy cloud email and password to auto-fetch it, or provide the 10-character hex key manually.
